## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature

## Checklist

- [ ] The app builds and runs (⌘R or `./build.sh`).
- [ ] I kept the `// SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-or-later` header on touched files.
- [ ] I followed the Liquid Glass discipline (content on material, glass for controls only).
- [ ] Any private-API changes stay inside `Bridge/` and are guarded at runtime.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` (Unreleased) and docs where relevant.
